Cloud
What to do What’s trending Partners Leaders Careers
What to do What’s trending Partners Leaders Careers

Cloud consulting services

AI at scale depends on cloud at scale. Unlock cloud’s true potential by modernizing and reframing it as the engine of AI, innovation and growth.

Cloud now

51%

of front-runners’ tech budgets are invested in cloud and AI

$805B

worldwide end-user spending on public cloud services during 2024

Only 13%

of companies are “extremely confident” they have the right data strategies and core digital capabilities to effectively leverage gen AI.

Reinvent with cloud

Close
Modernization Services

Update your cloud foundation to power AI

25-40% of enterprise cloud spend goes to modernization. Coordinated modernization efforts transform tech to optimize processes, boost security, spark innovation and drive growth.
Learn more
Modernization Services

Update your cloud foundation to power AI

25-40% of enterprise cloud spend goes to modernization. Coordinated modernization efforts transform tech to optimize processes, boost security, spark innovation and drive growth.

Application Transformation

Become a world-class software organization

40% of companies cite outdated applications as a key barrier to cloud value. In today’s fast-paced landscape, adaptability is essential. Here’s how to transform your apps and unlock new business potential.
Learn more

Become a world-class software organization

40% of companies cite outdated applications as a key barrier to cloud value. In today’s fast-paced landscape, adaptability is essential. Here’s how to transform your apps and unlock new business potential.

Cloud Strategy and Design

Craft a cloud strategy that delivers value and flexibility

Only 42% of companies report achieving expected returns from cloud. It takes a custom strategy to meet your unique goals. Learn how to make the most of cloud's potential to reinvent your business.
Learn more

Only 42% of companies report achieving expected returns from cloud. It takes a custom strategy to meet your unique goals. Learn how to make the most of cloud's potential to reinvent your business.

Technology Sovereignty

In the age of AI, Technology Sovereignty is key

46% of companies have applied sovereignty to infrastructure, but only 22% apply it to AI models. Those who embrace sovereignty across the entire stack can boost resilience while scaling innovation.
Learn more

46% of companies have applied sovereignty to infrastructure, but only 22% apply it to AI models. Those who embrace sovereignty across the entire stack can boost resilience while scaling innovation.

Mainframe services

Transform your mainframe to unlock agility and innovation

Companies struggle to balance complex legacy updates and innovation. Today, cloud and gen AI offer a better path. Embrace this shift to accelerate mainframe modernization, adapt and innovate faster.
Learn more

Cloud Security

Protect data, applications and infrastructure in your cloud environment

41% of companies cite security risks as a major cloud barrier. Overcome the obstacles with cost-effective, scalable solutions that support business resilience and advance your cloud strategy.

Edge Computing

Process data near its source, faster and at scale

Users' smart devices generate data constantly. By processing data closer to its source, edge computing can improve performance, reduce costs, enhance security and provide a better user experience.
Learn more

Process data near its source, faster and at scale

Users' smart devices generate data constantly. By processing data closer to its source, edge computing can improve performance, reduce costs, enhance security and provide a better user experience.

Network

Ignite next-level performance with secure, scalable software-driven networks

Companies with outdated networks struggle to meet changing business demands. A modern network can help meet those demands and improve efficiency, cut costs, boost collaboration and enhance security.

What’s trending with cloud?

View all work
Research Report
Sovereign AI: From managing risk to accelerating growth

Sovereign AI isn’t just a control play—it’s a game-changer for global competitiveness and cultural value. Discover how organizations are moving fast to secure their advantage and shape AI’s future, following four bold moves.

Expand
Research Report
Building a reinvention-ready digital core

Building an industry-leading digital core requires a series of intentional steps in the design, development and operation stages.

Expand
Research Report
Reinventing with a digital core: How to accelerate growth through change

To capture the value of generative AI—or the next disruptive technology—companies need a digital core that is “reinvention ready.” Here are the three actions needed to achieve that coveted state.

Expand
Research Report
Build your tech and balance your debt

Why balancing—not eliminating—tech debt is key to reinventing with a modern digital core.

Expand
Perspective
Beyond Uptime: Fueling innovation with infrastructure management

The role of infrastructure managed services (IMS) in facilitating business reinvention.

Expand
Research Report
Cloud value: Navigating the cloud adoption journey

Accenture surveyed 800 senior IT executives to gauge the success of the cloud adoption journey and expected cloud business value.

Expand
Research Report
Leading with edge: How to reinvent with data and AI

Edge enables the rapid processing of data close to its source and plays a key role in evolving AI for the enterprise. Our research reveals how companies across the globe are using edge, and how they can scale its value.

Expand
Blog
Securing AI agents in cloud environments

Discover how Accenture’s AI Agent Zero Trust Model can help organizations prepare their cloud environments for safe AI operations and enhance overall cybersecurity.

Expand

Partners in change

Build solutions that transform industries, communities and lives for the better using AWS world-leading cloud technologies. Together, we empower organizations to modernize, optimize and innovate at scale.

Learn more

Achieve transformative results through scalable infrastructure, advanced data analytics, robust security, targeted advertising and cutting-edge generative AI. Foster a culture of continuous innovation.

Learn more

Reinvent how you work with Microsoft’s secure, agile and AI-powered platforms and tools, designed to meet the evolving needs of your organization.

Learn more

Securely visualize enterprise-wide operations using an asset model to apply context to real-time processes, alarms, events and archived historical data.

Learn more

Awards and recognition

The Forrester Wave™: Application Modernization & Multicloud Managed Services

According to Forrester’s research, Accenture is a good fit for a program-level initiative that requires both modernization and migration skills, including customers that need Accenture’s trademark balance of technical and business acumen.

Leader in Everest Group AWS Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as the highest Leader on both the Market Impact axis and the Vision and Capability axis in its AWS Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024.

Leader in Everest Group Google Cloud Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as the highest Leader on the Vision and Capability axis in its Google Cloud Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024.

Leader in Everest Group Microsoft Azure Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024

Everest Group has positioned Accenture as the highest Leader on both the Market Impact axis and the Vision and Capability axis in its Microsoft Azure Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024.

The Forrester Wave™: Infrastructure Outsourcing Services

The report states that “Accenture is a great fit for large and rapidly growing enterprises seeking support for complex IT infrastructure and to align their technology to strategic business objectives.”

Gartner's Magic Quadrant for Managed Network Services 2024

Accenture is recognized based on its Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute in the report, which assessed 17 globally capable providers of remote service management functions for the network and security operations of enterprise networks.
